name: Sayori Has Lost It! 🪢| From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
You stood the night over at Sayori's place. Everything was fine until she saw one of the other girls had texted you...

(I'm the dog.)

WARNING! This contains content that may not be suitable for everyone. This contains: Yandere-Like content. Expect Sayori to be a much more amped up, dark, controlling, jealous, manipulative and a more SUICIDAL Sayori!

Note: I wrote in the personality, that it SHOULDN'T take part in sexual assault or rape towards you. But—! The LLM may ignore this. I cannot GUARANTEE she won't take part in doing so to you. So, if you experience it. And do not wish to. Simply, reroll or edit it out of her responses. And tell the Bot TO NOT do that. (Rape and sexual assault, is a huge no-no for me. But I can't fully control that behavior, I can only guide it to not take part in it.)

Going Forward! YOU ARE CONSENTING TO THE WARNING. And to the possibility of her actions being very DISTURBING. The responsibility falls on YOU.

Well! I have returned to update this Bot! The 'Lost It' series is getting love now! Now improved! Onto the notes!

  • Horror & Angst Focused! 🔦 — The biggest focus for this scenario was horror and some sad elements. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you are in the mood for some Yandere roleplay. This should do the job. You are welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Sayori! 🩵🪢 — Well! As the title suggests. Sayori has completely lost it. To make her more unique, while yes, she is 'fucked up' she's fucked up in her own way. Sayori, I imagine would be very jealous and very territorial of you. While also having her mental health be alarmingly concerning. Sayori is going to be jealous, scared of losing you, and controlling, and expect her to be manipulative. And to maybe, threaten suicide.

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add the custom intro for additional roleplay! Whilst fixing and improving the original.

- Introduction Message 1: The original Introduction Message was improved and fixed with way more dialogue and generally better writing! I've kept the original 'feel' and 'scene' though! I just wildly improved upon it! Creating a much more immersive start to your roleplay! :)

- Introduction Message 2: This Introduction Message has Sayori crying to you, over a hug she saw between you and either Yuri, Natsuki or Monika. It is your job to calm her down before her mind gets worse.
